recommendation.title: I locked myself in a room until made $3m by funding businesses
recommendation.summary: Turn missed follow-up into booked calls. For founders with early traction who need a lean acquisition and crm stack before hiring a full sales team, this offer fixes slow follow-up, missed leads, and messy conversion handoffs
recommendation.thesis: A productized done-for-you crm automation and lead follow-up system that captures, qualifies, and nurtures inbound prospects for founders with early traction who need a lean acquisition and crm stack before hiring a f... It is most compelling for founders with early traction who need a lean acquisition and crm stack before hiring a full sales team and monetizes through productized service revenue from setup fees plus recurring retainers.
execution_plan: Interview 5-10 prospects who match this ICP: Founders with early traction who need a lean acquisition and CRM stack before hiring a full sales team
Package the offer as: A done-for-you CRM automation and lead follow-up system that captures, qualifies, and nurtures inbound prospects
Test a pricing structure such as: Start with a productized setup package, then add a monthly retainer for ongoing optimization and reporting
Launch with this first channel: Launch one paid acquisition channel with tight tracking, then retarget interested visitors into booked calls

headline: Turn missed follow-up into booked calls
subheadline: For founders with early traction who need a lean acquisition and crm stack before hiring a full sales team, this offer fixes slow follow-up, missed leads, and messy conversion handoffs.
positioning: A focused CRM automation offer for founders with early traction who need a lean acquisition and crm stack before hiring a full sales team, designed to turn more demand into qualified calls.
core_thesis: A productized done-for-you crm automation and lead follow-up system that captures, qualifies, and nurtures inbound prospects for founders with early traction who need a lean acquisition and crm stack before hiring a f... It is most compelling for founders with early traction who need a lean acquisition and crm stack before hiring a full sales team and monetizes through productized service revenue from setup fees plus recurring retainers.
profitability_path: Profitability improves when one implementation template can be reused across clients, reducing labor while preserving premium pricing
ideal_customer_profile: Founders with early traction who need a lean acquisition and CRM stack before hiring a full sales team
who_its_for: This is built for founders with early traction who need a lean acquisition and crm stack before hiring a full sales team who want a simpler way to turn attention into qualified pipeline.
offer: A done-for-you CRM automation and lead follow-up system that captures, qualifies, and nurtures inbound prospects
pricing_model: Start with a productized setup package, then add a monthly retainer for ongoing optimization and reporting
pricing_blurb: Start with a setup package and add a monthly optimization retainer once the funnel is converting.
acquisition_channel: Launch one paid acquisition channel with tight tracking, then retarget interested visitors into booked calls
proof_points: A hundred and fifty thousand dollars a month, that's what my funding business generates and I'm going to walk you through exactly how I did it step by step [music] from the very first deal all the way to a hundred and

I locked myself in, studied [music] everything about business funding, made a ton of mistakes, burned through bad leads, got ghosted by clients, and figured out the framework that took me from zero to six figures a mo
[music] And in this video, I'm going to break down all three stages so you can skip the mistakes [music] I made and get there way faster
customer_pain_points: Leads are arriving, but follow-up is slow or inconsistent
Prospects fall through the cracks because the CRM is underused or disorganized
Too much manual work is being handled by the owner or a small team
revenue_model: Productized service revenue from setup fees plus recurring retainers
offer_outcomes: Capture inbound leads the moment they arrive.
Automate follow-up so qualified prospects do not go cold.
Centralize pipeline visibility inside one simple CRM workflow.
Turn more demand into booked calls and sales conversations.
cta_support: Use launch one paid acquisition channel with tight tracking, then retarget interested visitors into booked calls to drive interest, then route responses into a simple audit, demo, or booking flow.
page_promises: Primary landing page and conversion CTA
Explain the service or product clearly
Show process and reduce buyer friction
Capture leads and schedule next step
